hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *".env.local"* ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: .env.local is protected — edit manually to avoid exposing live keys' && exit 2 || true

file=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && cd /Users/Shoji.S/homeplan-ai && npx eslint "$file" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
